title: Metode de analiză a riscului financiar al întreprinderii în condiţiile incertitudinii
author: Movilă, Irina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The risk reflects the possibility that economic and financial results may evolve in a way that can lead to bankruptcy. Identifying and assessing these risks is the most complicated stage of an enterprise's risk management system. Risk assessment is divided into qualitative analysis and quantitative analysis. The article presents methods for analyzing the financial risk of the enterprise under uncertainty: method based on the profitability threshold and the leverage method.
